In the heart of the Medina, Dar Zelda is situated just next to Medersa Ben Youssef and a 15-minute walk from JemaÃ¢ El Fna Square. Guests are invited to relax on the terrace or cool of in the plunge pool on the patio.
The air-conditioned guest rooms at Dar Zelda feature satellite TV, free Wi-Fi internet access and Egyptian cotton bed linen. They each have a view on the patio and some rooms have a fireplace and a seating area.
Local dishes can be served in the dining area, on the terrace or in the patio, and a typical Moroccan breakfast is served daily. Tours, excursions and transfers can be organized upon request.

hotels.description_en:
Located a 15-minute walk from JamaÃ¢ El Fna Square, this riad features air-conditioned rooms with free Wi-Fi and a terrace with a view of the Mosque. Transfers from and to the Airport are provided at a surcharge.
With a traditional dÃ©cor and original zellige tiles, each room at Riad El Youssoufi has a private bathroom with shower and free toiletries. They all have a patio view and a seating area.
A continental breakfast is served daily and Moroccan specialties are proposed in the dining room. An indoor plunge pool, a sun terrace with deckchairs and a patio with fountain and plants are available at Riad El Youssoufi.
Massages and a babysitting service are provided upon request. Marrakech Airport is a 13-minute drive away and the Majorelle Garden is 2 km away.
